declared.title: OONI Analysis of Telegram Blocking in Kenya During the 2023 and 2024 KCSE Exams
declared.selection_rationale: Second OONI document, added for the 10-document/4-org milestone (2026-07-13) specifically to diversify beyond the walking-skeleton's single Tanzania document and re-test OONI's acquisition behavior on a different URL. Reconnaissance probe (2026-07-13, single GET, no retry) returned HTTP 429 on this URL too -- second independent confirmation that ooni.org's blocking is server-wide, not specific to the original document's URL. Topically distinct from the Tanzania document (exam-integrity-motivated blocking of a messaging app, rather than a platform block during civil unrest) -- genuine coverage contribution, not a near-duplicate. Publication month approximate (based on the post's URL date prefix), exact day not yet confirmed.
